name: Parth Rainchwar
positioning: I build at the intersection of systems engineering and behavioral research — where data, scale, and human meaning converge.
about: I work on systems that combine data, user behavior, and real-world constraints like scale, ambiguity, and time.
My experience spans backend engineering and product-level decision-making, where I’ve built and operated systems under practical limitations.
I actively study patterns in human decision-making and consumption using data, with a focus on how these insights can shape better systems.
